{"society_power": 0.7, "state_power": 7.3, "society_change": -0.1, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "WWII \"war effort\": intensified extraction, forced labor, crushed strikes", "reasoning": "The WWII war effort, uranium/copper extraction, and autonomous wartime administration pushed the despotic colonial state toward the strong end of the rubric, while the 1941 Union Mini\u00e8re strike and 1944 Luluabourg mutiny were violently suppressed, reaffirming that autonomous society remained atomized despite nascent urban proletarianization."}
